title: calophyllum nodosum
intro: Calophyllum nodosum, also known as the Calophyllum tree or Calophyllum oil tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its oil, which is known for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calophyllum nodosum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and fight against infections, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Calophyllum nodosum include its oil, which can be used topically or taken internally, as well as its leaves and bark, which can be used to make teas and infusions.
